subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses in truth from the realm of transcendent glory and made them a testimony from His presence unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الایات بالحق من جبروت عز علیا و جعلها حجه من عنده علی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @call to action
